description: A current employee has applied for an open position in another department.

nodes.task_description: Identify the internal candidate's application in the ATS.

expected_outcome.value: Recruiter sees the application and notes the candidate is a current employee.

nodes.task_description: Notify the employee's current manager of their application, per company policy.

expected_outcome.value: Recruiter informs the current manager of the employee's interest in the new role.

nodes.task_description: Review the employee's internal performance history and tenure alongside their resume.

expected_outcome.value: Recruiter considers both internal performance data and external experience during the screening process.
